title: View reflects current on-disk state
description: A project owner regenerates the view and sees exactly what is currently on disk, never a stale snapshot.
iWant: the view to reflect exactly what is on disk at the moment it is generated
soThat: I never review a stale snapshot

acceptanceCriteria.description: An edit on disk is present after the view is regenerated
acceptanceCriteria.then: the change is present in the output

acceptanceCriteria.description: The view is produced fresh from the on-disk tree and carries no cached prior state
acceptanceCriteria.then: it is produced fresh from the on-disk tree and carries no cached prior state
